Notes: Prerequisite asserts existence of an unrelated TXT RRset, then UPDATE deletes one exact TXT RR that is absent; follow-up queries check whether the absent name remains absent and whether the UPDATE was accepted or rejected.

Steps.Description: Assert that ok.campus.edu. has a TXT rrset, then attempt to delete one exact TXT RR at rr.campus.edu. that is not present in the zone.

Steps.Name: rr.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the absent TXT rrset remains absent after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: ok.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Sanity-check that the prerequisite RRset remains present or to expose rollback if the server rejects the UPDATE.
